description: Use this API to submit potential solutions to the problems that occurred during the last unzip attempt. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = scenariounzipsolutions(nsolutions, indexes, solutions, paths)

parameters.name: indexes
parameters.description: An array of NSOLUTIONS elements specifying internal problem indexes which were obtained from SCENARIOUNZIPPROBLEMS. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: solutions
parameters.description: An array of NSOLUTIONS elements specifying solutions to attempt Note: These solutions do not apply to all problems. For example if the file is missing from the archive only a solution of 0 will solve the problem. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: paths
parameters.description: An array of NSOLUTIONS elements specifying used to attempt to unzip a file to a new path or under a new name All name changes will be reflected in the Scenario. If no name is specified for a particular problem the name will not change. (input).

solutions.description: retry to unzip, possibly with a different file name.
to overwrite the current item on disk.
